title: clusters describe output data
description: Shape of the ``data`` field on a successful ``clusters describe <name>`` envelope.

config.description: Full cluster config block from clusters.yaml (host, scheduler, scratch, gpu_types, constraints, etc.). Shape varies per cluster; see config-precedence.md for fields the framework recognizes.
config.title: Config

unknown_keys.description: Yaml keys present in this cluster's entry that ClusterConfig does not recognize. Populated only when --strict is passed. Empty list = clean entry; null = strict mode was not requested.
unknown_keys.title: Unknown Keys
